component.name: Edit Job, Session
component.description: Handle, Back, session header (16px Brand/Accent clock + Title-H3 “Edit Session”) with Start/End Time labels and four body inputs — or job header (“Edit Job”) with stacked fields; footer: Brand/Accent SAVE CHANGES (shadow Brand/Primary) + destructive outline trash.

figmaNamingNote: Figma **Edit Job** uses placeholder copy on inputs; **Edit Job Empty** shows the populated sample job row (`1286:701`). Code maps these to `editJobPlaceholder` and `editJobFilled` respectively.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Edit Job, Session (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.content: edit-job-session-content (React; Figma stacks handle + body + job slot + footer in the sheet)
figmaLayerNames.body: edit-job-session-body (back + header + session fields when `Edit Session`)
figmaLayerNames.jobFields: edit-job-session-job-fields (Figma `SLOT` for job variants — sits between body and footer)
figmaLayerNames.title: edit-job-session-title

codeProps.job: optional Partial<EditJobFormValues>; merged with per-variant defaults
codeProps.children: optional; replaces default job field stack for editJob*

notes: 2026-04-07: `EditJobSessionBottomSheet` mirrors handle, Back, headers, field shells, and SAVE + delete footer per Figma `1284:789`.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1284:789` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Structural frames renamed to `edit-job-session-*` (surface, handle, body, session fields, job slot, footer, back, header, title icon/text, session inputs, primary/delete). `Edit Session` nests date/time fields under `edit-job-session-body`; job variants use `edit-job-session-job-fields` (`SLOT` in Figma) between body and footer. React uses `data-name` on the same hooks; `edit-job-session-content` wraps padded stack. No `flatten()` in automation.
